name: Get Data Extract File Listing
description: This endpoint returns an array of information about the files contained within the data extract created by a specified job. The job must be spawned by a data request created by the authenticated user. The user must have executive overview or project administrator permissions. The information includes the file name, creation date, and size. If the job was cancelled or failed to create a data extract, this endpoint will return a 404 error.

name: Get Signed URL for Data Extract File
description: This endpoint returns a signed URL to retrieve a specific file from a data extract of a specified job. The signed URL is valid for 60 seconds, allowing the user to download the file. The file could be a CSV file, a README file, or a master ZIP file containing all CSV files and the README. The user must have executive overview or project administrator permissions.

name: Get PDF Export Job Status
description: Returns the status of a PDF export job and provides the download data once the export is complete. Use the job ID from the POST request to track the export job status and download the file when ready.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via either a two-legged or three-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: In a two-legged authentication context, this header limits access to the specified user.

uri_parameters.name: project_id
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the project. Remove the 'b.' prefix from a Data Management API project ID.

uri_parameters.name: version_id
uri_parameters.description: URL-encoded version ID (URN) of the exported page from the previous export request.

uri_parameters.name: export_id
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the export job, returned when initiating the export job via the POST request.

status_codes.404: Not Found — The requested project, exported document, or job does not exist.

status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — An unknown server error occurred.

body_structure.id: string (UUID) — The unique ID of the export job.
body_structure.status: enum: string (committed, completed, failed) — The status of the export job.

data.resourceId: string — The URL-encoded ID (URN) of the exported PDF page.
data.signedUrl: string — The signed URL for downloading the exported PDF page, valid for two minutes.

name: Export Page from PDF
description: Exports a single page from an uploaded PDF file into a new PDF file. You can also export the page’s markups (annotations) and hyperlinks. This is an asynchronous operation and will return an export ID to track the job status.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token>, obtained via a two-legged or three-legged OAuth flow.

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.description: Must be application/json.

headers.name: x-user-id
headers.description: In a two-legged authentication context, the app has access to all users specified by the administrator in the SaaS integrations UI.

uri_parameters.name: project_id
uri_parameters.description: UUID of the project. This corresponds to project ID in the Data Management API. Remove the 'b.' prefix from a Data Management API project ID.

uri_parameters.name: version_id
uri_parameters.description: URL-encoded version ID (URN) of the page to export. The ID corresponds to the specific page of the PDF in the Plans folder.
